samples.xml_description:
Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. Clock signal A. Clock signal B. Active-low reset signal A. Active-low reset signal B. Input data signal. Input enable signal. Output data signal. Register to store input data. Register to store input enable signal. Control register for selection of input data. Control register for selection of input data.

Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer.

Register stores input data .

Register stores input enable signal .

Register and control the selection of input data.

Output is assigned the value of when is active.
